titleStmt.title: SII 30.104: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 104. (A.R. No. 181 of 1915.) Tirumukkūḍal, Madhurantakam Taluk, Chingleput District Veṅkaṭēsa Perumāḷ temple-on the east wall of the same prakāra Vira Rājēndra-Chōla: •••: 11th c. A.D.

summary.p: This inscription contains only the praśasti, ‘tiruvaḷar tiṟaḷpuyattu’ etc. and stops with the name of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiruvaḷar tiraḷpuyat tirunilavalaiyan=tan maṇippūṇeṉat tāṅkiya maṉmaṇikkoṟṟa veṇkuṭainiḻaṟ kuvalaiyattuyirkaḷai peṟṟa tāyiṉum peṇa maṟṟai yaṟaikaḻalaracar taṉṉaṭi niḻalotuṅka Uṟaipilattuṭai kaliyotuṅka Arumpeṟaṟ ṟamaiyaṉāḷavan=tāṉai Irumpuvi nikaḻ rājādhirājaṉeṉ ṟoḷirmaṇi neṭumuṭi cūṭṭi taṉṟiru maittuṉaṉṉākiya kaṅkaikoṇṭa co
ḻaṉai Eḻuyar yāṉaic cerapāṇṭiyaṉeṉṟiṇṭiyal maṇimuṭi yicai peṟaccūṭṭi pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅ kuṭuttu Āṇṭakai vaṭikoṇṭa katirvel muṭikoṇṭa coḻaṉaic cun=taracoḻaṉeṉṟeḻil muṭicūṭṭit taṉ kiḷaiyavaravaṟkāy pukaliṭam veṟu veṟaruḷi malaikkum vikkalaṉṟaṉṉeṭu varicilait taṭakkai mācāman=taṉ kaṅkapākkaḷattiṭai niṉṟuntuṅkapattirai pukatturatti Āṅkavar veṅkai naṉṉāṭṭil miṭṭumavar viṭṭa tāṅ
karum peruvalittaṇṭu keṭattākki mātaṇṭa nāyakaṉ cāmuṇṭa rācaṉaic ceṟṟavaṉ cirattiṉaiyaṟuttu maṟṟavaṉṉoru makaḷākiya virukrayaṉṟevi nākalaiyeṉṉu n=tokaiyañcāyalai mukattoṭu mukku veṟākki mikaikatir muṉṟām vicaiyiṉum paripavan tirvaṉeṉak karutip poruvāṉ kūṭalccaṅkamat tākavamallaṉ makkaḷākiya vikkalaṉ ciṅkaṇaṉ Eṉṟivar tammoṭu meṇṇil cāmantarai veṉṟamar tūci muṉviṭṭu taṉṟu
ṇai maṉṉarun=tāṉum piṉṉaretu can=ta vaṭakaṭaleṉa vakutta tāṉaiyait taṭakkaḷi ṟoṉṟāl kalakki Aṭalpuri kocalar ciṅkaṉaik koṭi(ppa)p paṭaimuṉpu tūci veṅkaḷiroṭu tuṇittup piṉṉai mutaliyāṉ matuvaṇaṉōṭa viritta talaiyoṭu vikkalaṉoṭa Aṇṇalaṉ mutaliṉar Aṉaivarum mamarporp paṇṇiṉa pakaṭiḻin=toṭa Ākavamallaṉum Avarkku muṉṉōṭa taṉveka veṅkaḷiṟṟiṉai vilakki vākai koṇṭāṅkavar tāramum mākulataṉamun
toṅkalun=tāraiyum mekaṭampamum cūkarakkoṭiyum makaratoraṇamum Oṭṭaka niraikaḷu mulokācanamum puṣvakappiṭiyum porukaḷi ṟīṭṭamum pāyparit tokaiyoṭum paṟittuc ceyoḷi vicaiyaṇi makuṭam micaiyoṭuñ cūṭṭitticaitoṟuñ ceṅkol celutti virattaṉikkoṭiyoṭu n=tiyākak koṭiyoṭum meṟppavar varukaveṉṟu porttoḻillurimaiyil leyti kecaripanmmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrī ntradeva
Digital edition of SII 30.104 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
